name: gomining-agent-skills
description: Agent skills for GoMining — a blockchain platform democratizing Bitcoin mining through Digital Miners NFTs, the GOMINING utility token, crypto-powered Visa cards, DeFi products, travel integrations, and avatar collections.
author: gomining

skills.name: gomining-overview
skills.description: Platform introduction, ecosystem basics, product overview, official resources

skills.name: gomining-miners
skills.description: Digital Miners NFTs — mining modes, Miner Wars, upgrades, maintenance, computing power, buying and selling

skills.name: gomining-avatars
skills.description: Avatar collections (Humans/Sentinels/Cryptiles/Luminars), Luminar VIP boost rules, secondary marketplace, merch

skills.name: gomining-nft
skills.description: Digital Miners NFTs, blockchains (ETH/BSC/SOL/TON), rarity attributes, mining rewards, earning modes

skills.name: gomining-vip
skills.description: VIP loyalty program — tiers (Bronze to Elite), hashrate/veGOMINING thresholds, maintenance discounts, Launchpad access, cashback rates

skills.name: gomining-token
skills.description: GOMINING token utility, use cases (marketplace, maintenance discounts, rewards, game boosts)

skills.name: gomining-tokenomics
skills.description: Token economics — locking (veGOMINING), voting systems, burn/mint mechanics, epochs, supply reduction (500M to 100M)

skills.name: gomining-wallet
skills.description: Crypto wallet — supported assets (BTC/GMT/USDT/USDC/ETH/BNB/SOL/TON), deposits, withdrawals, Fireblocks, limits

skills.name: gomining-simple-earn
skills.description: Simple Earn — passive BTC interest on crypto balances, snapshot-based rewards, no lockup, yield sources

skills.name: gomining-card
skills.description: GoMining Visa debit card — supported crypto (GOMINING/BTC/USDT/USDC), KYC, eligibility, Apple Pay, Google Wallet

skills.name: gomining-payments
skills.description: Payment infrastructure — Ecommpay, Open Banking (PSD2), MNPL installments, Mercuryo, KYC/AML (Sumsub)

skills.name: gomining-cashback
skills.description: Cashback system — TH/s mining power rewards from Card spending and Travel bookings by VIP tier

skills.name: gomining-travel
skills.description: GoMining Travel — hotel booking with GM tokens, TH/s cashback by VIP tier, SolarTrip integration

skills.name: gomining-promos
skills.description: Promotional system — promo codes (general/individual/referral), GoBoxes, bonus miners, discount and cashback bonuses

skills.name: gomining-academy
skills.description: Educational platform, courses (GoMining Basics, Bitcoin & Mining), 79+ articles, product guides, certificates

skills.name: gomining-investment-guide
skills.description: Investment guide — budget-tier recommendations ($10–$10K), ROI examples, optimization strategies, VIP progression, risk considerations
